Sandbox_IKappaIDSuiteToolsTiles_MaxClean: Maximum size for cleaning up an area
Sandbox_IKappaIDSuiteToolsTiles_EnableCa: Turn on the tile painting list
Sandbox_IKappaIDSuiteToolsTiles_MaxPaint: How far from you tile tools can place or paint
Sandbox_IKappaIDSuiteToolsTiles_ProtectC: Block tile edits inside claimed safehouses unless the player has build permission
